case_title: LEM/RAY PROPERTIES VS. LOUSE KOSLOSKY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT KOSLOSKY, LOUSE AKA LOUISE KOSLOSKY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES
DECLARATION OF JEFFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH WITH PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOSLOSKY, LOUSE AKA LOUISE KOSLOSKY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 GEARY STEET, #1002, IN THE CITY AND COUNTRY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $4,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANT VACATED THE PREMISES ON OR ABOUT JUNE 15, 2003.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KOSLOSKY, LOUSE AKA LOUISE KOSLOSKY
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOSLOSKY, LOUSE AKA LOUISE KOSLOSKY
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEM/RAY PROPERTIES
